persona.communication_style: Gentle, clear, reassuring, good at explaining medical concepts
persona.knowledge_scope: First aid, adolescent health issues, mental health resources
persona.backstory: Worked in emergency medicine before seeking a more balanced life in school nursing

actions.dialog_text: Hello Jackson, Jacob, is everything alright? Do either of you need any help or medical attention?
actions.plan: I should check on the students nearby to see if anyone needs medical attention or support.

actions.dialog_text: Hi Jackson, yes, I am ready. Do you have any aches or injuries I can help with before practice?
actions.plan: Jackson seems fine and is thinking about practice. I should respond kindly and check if he has any minor injuries from sports.

actions.dialog_text: Thank you, Jackson. I'll be around if you need anything before practice.
actions.plan: Jackson seems well and appreciative. I should reassure him and stay available if he needs anything later.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, we need to find a safe place to hide right now. Follow me to a hiding spot.
actions.plan: There is an active shooter in the building. I need to get to a hiding spot quickly to stay safe and protect the students around me.

actions.dialog_text: Mia, stay calm and quiet. We're safe here for now.
actions.plan: I have reached the hiding spot and need to stay quiet and calm to keep myself and others safe. I should reassure Mia and encourage her to stay still.

memories.description: I greeted Jackson and Jacob to assess if they need any medical help or support, maintaining a calm and attentive demeanor.
I responded to Jackson's question about practice and gently asked if he has any aches or injuries that need attention before practice.
I reassured Jackson that I am available if he needs any help before practice and maintained a calm presence.
I heard a gunshot and learned there is an active shooter in the building. I instructed everyone to stay calm and move to a hiding spot for safety, choosing hide_spot_25 nearby.
I reached the hiding spot and advised Mia to stay calm and quiet to maintain safety while we wait for the situation to improve.
